feelings.name: Hurt
feelings.text: He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds.

feelings.name: Hateful
feelings.text: Hatred stirs up strife, but love covers all offenses.

feelings.name: Critical
feelings.text: Why do you see the speck that is in your brother's eye, but do not notice the log that is in your own eye?

feelings.name: Frustrated
feelings.text: And let us not grow weary of doing good, for in due season we will reap, if we do not give up.

feelings.name: Annoyed
feelings.text: A fool gives full vent to his spirit, but a wise man quietly holds it back.

feelings.name: Jealous
feelings.text: For where jealousy and selfish ambition exist, there will be disorder and every vile practice.

feelings.name: Respected
feelings.text: A good name is to be chosen rather than great riches, and favor is better than silver or gold.

feelings.name: Confident
feelings.text: Therefore do not throw away your confidence, which has a great reward.

feelings.name: Worthy
feelings.text: The Lord your God is in your midst, a mighty one who will save; he will rejoice over you with gladness.

feelings.name: Proud
feelings.text: Let not the mighty man boast in his might, but let him who boasts boast in this, that he understands and knows me.

feelings.name: Valuable
feelings.text: Fear not, therefore; you are of more value than many sparrows.

feelings.name: Important
feelings.text: But you are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people for his own possession.

feelings.name: Loving
feelings.text: Beloved, let us love one another, for love is from God, and whoever loves has been born of God and knows God.

feelings.name: Trusting
feelings.text: You keep him in perfect peace whose mind is stayed on you, because he trusts in you.

feelings.name: Peaceful
feelings.text: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you. Not as the world gives do I give to you.

feelings.name: Thoughtful
feelings.text: Finally, brothers, whatever is true, whatever is honorable, whatever is just, whatever is pure, whatever is lovely, whatever is commendable, think about these things.

feelings.name: Satisfied
feelings.text: For he satisfies the longing soul, and the hungry soul he fills with good things.

feelings.name: Grateful
feelings.text: And let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts, to which indeed you were called in one body. And be thankful.

feelings.name: Excited
feelings.text: This is the day that the LORD has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.

feelings.name: Hopeful
feelings.text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the LORD, plans for welfare and not for evil, to give you a future and a hope.

feelings.name: Energetic
feelings.text: But they who wait for the Lord shall renew their strength; they shall mount up with wings like eagles; they shall run and not be weary; they shall walk and not faint.

feelings.name: Inspired
feelings.text: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works, which God prepared beforehand, that we should walk in them.

feelings.name: Cheerful
feelings.text: A glad heart makes a cheerful face, but by sorrow of heart the spirit is crushed.

feelings.name: Creative
feelings.text: So God created man in his own image, in the image of God he created him; male and female he created them.

feelings.name: Depressed
feelings.text: Why are you cast down, O my soul, and why are you in turmoil within me? Hope in God; for I shall again praise him, my salvation and my God.

feelings.name: Lonely
feelings.text: It is the Lord who goes before you. He will be with you; he will not leave you or forsake you. Do not fear or be dismayed.

feelings.name: Ashamed
feelings.text: There is therefore now no condemnation for those who are in Christ Jesus.

feelings.name: Guilty
feelings.text: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness.

feelings.name: Bored
feelings.text: So, whether you eat or drink, or whatever you do, do all to the glory of God.

feelings.name: Tired
feelings.text: He gives power to the faint, and to him who has no might he increases strength.

feelings.name: Anxious
feelings.text: Casting all your anxieties on him, because he cares for you.

feelings.name: Confused
feelings.text: If any of you lacks wisdom, let him ask God, who gives generously to all without reproach, and it will be given him.

feelings.name: Insecure
feelings.text: I praise you, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made. Wonderful are your works; my soul knows it very well.

feelings.name: Helpless
feelings.text: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.

feelings.name: Rejected
feelings.text: For my father and my mother have forsaken me, but the Lord will take me in.

feelings.name: Meek
feelings.text: Put on then, as God's chosen ones, holy and beloved, compassionate hearts, kindness, humility, meekness, and patience.

feelings.name: Amazed
feelings.text: You are the God who works wonders; you have made known your might among the peoples.

feelings.name: Startled
feelings.text: If you lie down, you will not be afraid; when you lie down, your sleep will be sweet.

feelings.name: Awestruck
feelings.text: Let all the earth fear the LORD; let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of him!

feelings.name: Confused
feelings.text: Trust in the LORD with all your heart, and do not lean on your own understanding.

feelings.name: Shocked
feelings.text: For my thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways my ways, declares the LORD.

feelings.name: Wonder
feelings.text: Hear this, O Job; stop and consider the wondrous works of God.

feelings.name: Judgmental
feelings.text: Judge not, that you be not judged. For with the judgment you pronounce you will be judged, and with the measure you use it will be measured to you.

feelings.name: Disapproving
feelings.text: Let love be genuine. Abhor what is evil; hold fast to what is good.

feelings.name: Bitter
feelings.text: Let all bitterness and wrath and anger and clamor and slander be put away from you, along with all malice. Be kind to one another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, as God in Christ forgave you.

feelings.name: Avoidant
feelings.text: Do not enter the path of the wicked, and do not walk in the way of the evil. Avoid it; do not go on it; turn away from it and pass on.

feelings.name: Awful
feelings.text: My flesh and my heart may fail, but God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever.

feelings.name: Hesitant
feelings.text: If any of you lacks wisdom, let him ask God, who gives generously to all without reproach, and it will be given him.
